name: Feature request
about: Propose a new command, agent, hook, skill, or capability
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

> **Before opening:** for non-trivial features, please open a Discussion first so the design can be aligned with `apex-spec.md`.

## Problem / motivation

<!--
What can't APEX do today that it should? Which of the 9 failures (or which user
flow) does this address?
-->

## Proposed solution

<!-- A concrete description of what should be added/changed -->

## Component type

- [ ] New command (`/apex:...`)
- [ ] New agent
- [ ] New hook
- [ ] New skill (stack-specific)
- [ ] New workflow recipe
- [ ] Enhancement to existing component
- [ ] Spec change

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why this one is better -->

## Impact on the spec

- [ ] No spec change needed
- [ ] Spec extension required (describe below)
- [ ] Spec change conflicts with current spec (describe below)

<!-- If a spec change is needed, point to the section of apex-spec.md and propose the new wording. -->

## Backward compatibility

- [ ] Fully backward-compatible
- [ ] Requires migration / deprecation (describe below)
- [ ] Breaking change (justify below)

## Additional context

<!-- Examples, references, links to similar features in other frameworks -->
